pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA + CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels, widens MLP to 3.5×, and uses Hessian-guided int5/int6 quant with Brotli to stay under 16MB.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
MLP 3.5× expansion with Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant
Fast causal n-gram tilt plus Brotli-11 headroom for eval
